description: Register a DuckDB IO manager connected to MotherDuck (serverless DuckDB cloud) for asset storage

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

motherduck_token_env_var.label: MotherDuck Token Env Var
motherduck_token_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MotherDuck service token
